name: part_010
file: tmp_【 #夏色まつり誕生祭2025 】重大告知あり！アイドル革命進行中！～今日の主役は夢の途中～　【ホロラ [L-XVS13TRTI]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_010.webm

scenes.description: Natsuiro Matsuri performs a medley of iconic Hololive songs.
Matsuri catches her breath and reflects on the medley and her first idol costume.

subtitles.original: 名前一度でハートん
subtitles.english: With just your name, my heart—

subtitles.original: どれも全部大事にしてあげる
subtitles.english: I'll treasure every single one of them

subtitles.original: わんっはー！みんなのためが力になる
subtitles.english: One-ha! Doing it for everyone gives me strength

subtitles.original: あるっはー！今日も賑やかすぎるくらい
subtitles.english: Al-ha! Today is almost too lively again

subtitles.original: 笑顔がもう止まらない
subtitles.english: I can't stop smiling anymore

subtitles.original: 想いは膨らんでいく
subtitles.english: These feelings keep growing bigger

subtitles.original: 重ねて今ギュッと噛み締めた
subtitles.english: Tightly reflecting on the moments we've shared

subtitles.original: 一人時間（とき）を数えては広がる
subtitles.english: Counting the moments as they spread out

subtitles.original: 風を感じたら真っ直ぐに
subtitles.english: Once I feel the breeze, I'll go straight ahead

subtitles.original: いくよ、夢見る空へ
subtitles.english: Here I go, towards the sky of my dreams

subtitles.original: 背伸びしては手を伸ばす
subtitles.english: Standing on my toes and reaching out my hand

subtitles.original: 憧れの…
subtitles.english: To the place I admire...

subtitles.original: 行き先示す星になろう
subtitles.english: I'll become a star that shows the way

subtitles.original: 続くその旅に手を差し伸べ合えたら
subtitles.english: If we can reach out to each other on this journey

subtitles.original: すぐに届くはずさ
subtitles.english: We'll surely reach it soon

subtitles.original: そっと踏み出した小さな勇気がもう
subtitles.english: The small bit of courage I took a step with

subtitles.original: 消えないように繋げよう
subtitles.english: Let's connect it so it never fades

subtitles.original: 不安も愛しさも大切に抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Cherishing and embracing both anxiety and love

subtitles.original: 共に行くよ 目を合わせて
subtitles.english: We'll go together, eye to eye
Three, two, one!

subtitles.original: 晴れ渡る空へ
subtitles.english: To the clear blue sky

subtitles.original: 飛び出せるよ
subtitles.english: I can leap out now

subtitles.original: 突き抜けてゆく
subtitles.english: Breaking through everything

subtitles.original: 僕たちの透き通る決意 今
subtitles.english: Our transparent determination, right now

subtitles.original: まだまだ止められないよ
subtitles.english: I still can't be stopped

subtitles.original: ありふれた今日こそ ときめきに変えて
subtitles.english: Turning even an ordinary today into excitement

subtitles.original: もっと僕たちがいつまでも
subtitles.english: Because we will always

subtitles.original: 背中を押すから
subtitles.english: Keep pushing you forward

subtitles.original: 憧れの舞台立ちたい
subtitles.english: I want to stand on the stage I admire

subtitles.original: らしく輝きたい
subtitles.english: I want to shine in my own way

subtitles.original: 時に涙して また笑いあいたい
subtitles.english: Crying sometimes, but wanting to laugh together again

subtitles.original: 同じ未来をみたい
subtitles.english: I want to see the same future

subtitles.original: あの夢手にしたい
subtitles.english: I want to grasp that dream

subtitles.original: 踏み出そう、奇跡の一歩を！
subtitles.english: Let's take a step, a miraculous step forward!

subtitles.original: 息切らして 夢追いかけたい
subtitles.english: Running out of breath, I want to chase my dreams

subtitles.original: ワクワク止まらない
subtitles.english: This excitement won't stop

subtitles.original: ゾワゾワ超えていく 世界に見せてあげる
subtitles.english: Going beyond the chills, I'll show the whole world

subtitles.original: アクセスしてみたい
subtitles.english: I want to reach out and connect

subtitles.original: 後悔なんてここにない
subtitles.english: There's no room for regrets here

subtitles.original: それぞれ違った心で
subtitles.english: With our each unique hearts

subtitles.original: スパークルは！
subtitles.english: Sparkle on!

subtitles.original: はい、ということで…
subtitles.english: Alright, so...

subtitles.original: ホロライブいにご…ホロライブメドレーでした！
subtitles.english: That was the Hololive Inigo... Hololive Medley!

subtitles.original: 自分の事務所なのに…ｗ
subtitles.english: Even though it's my own agency... (laughs)

subtitles.original: え、どうだった？なんか激エモだったんじゃないですか？
subtitles.english: So, how was it? It was super emotional, right?

subtitles.original: そしてね、この衣装は初めてもらったアイドル衣装なんですよね。
subtitles.english: And you know, this outfit is actually the very first idol costume I ever received.

subtitles.original: なんかあの時を思い出してなんかすごいジーンときてしまいますわね。
subtitles.english: Remembering those times really makes me feel quite moved.

subtitles.original: そう、まつりはね、元々そのアイドルデビューじゃなかったんですよ、ホロライブって。
subtitles.english: Right, because originally, Matsuri didn't debut as an 'idol' back then in Hololive.

subtitles.original: で、この衣装もらって、「よし、アイドルとして頑張るぞ！」というね、
subtitles.english: But when I got this outfit, it made me think, "Alright, I'm gonna do my best as an idol!"

subtitles.original: 気持ちを改めて思い出し、頑張っていこうかなという気持ちでございます。
subtitles.english: Remembering that feeling makes me want to keep working hard going forward.

subtitles.original: はい、そしてそして、今回も！
subtitles.english: Okay, and next up, just like always!

subtitles.original: 誕生日グッズでございまーす！やったー！
subtitles.english: It's time for the birthday merchandise! Yay!

subtitles.original: 嬉しい！ということで、一つずつ紹介していきます。
subtitles.english: I'm so happy! So, let me introduce them one by one.

subtitles.original: まずはこちら、ドドン！
subtitles.english: First up is this, ta-da!

subtitles.original: 「薄すぎ！」おっぱいマウスパッド！やったー！
subtitles.english: The "Way Too Thin!" Oppai Mouse Pad! Yay!

subtitles.original: イラストはえく先生。まつり待望のね、マウスパッドでございますよ。
subtitles.english: The illustration is by Eku-sensei. It's the mouse pad Matsuri has been waiting for.

subtitles.original: もう、あのちなみに言うと、膨らみはないですｗ
subtitles.english: By the way, just so you know, there is no 'padding' at all. (laughs)

subtitles.original: 普通のマウスパッドとなっております。
subtitles.english: It's just a completely flat mouse pad.
